summary: Completed testing of Bookvia Reports/Analytics tab feature. All backend API tests (11/11) passed. Frontend Reports tab UI working correctly with all components rendering properly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/businesses/my/reports requires authentication (401) - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses/my/reports rejects regular user auth (403) - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses/my/reports with default period=month returns correct structure - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses/my/reports?period=week returns correct data - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses/my/reports?period=quarter returns correct data - PASSED
Backend: GET /api/businesses/my/reports?period=year returns correct data - PASSED
Backend: top_services structure verified (name, bookings, revenue) - PASSED
Backend: top_clients structure verified (name, email, visits, total_spent) - PASSED
Backend: peak_hours structure verified (hour in HH:00 format, bookings) - PASSED
Backend: peak_days structure verified (7 days: Lun-Dom with bookings) - PASSED
Backend: summary numeric values are non-negative - PASSED
Frontend: Reports tab (data-testid='tab-reports') appears in business dashboard - PASSED
Frontend: Revenue card (data-testid='report-revenue-card') renders correctly - PASSED
Frontend: Bookings card (data-testid='report-bookings-card') renders correctly - PASSED
Frontend: Completed card (data-testid='report-completed-card') renders correctly - PASSED
Frontend: Cancel card (data-testid='report-cancel-card') renders correctly - PASSED
Frontend: Revenue chart (data-testid='revenue-chart') renders with Recharts BarChart - PASSED
Frontend: Top services card (data-testid='top-services-card') shows services with progress bars - PASSED
Frontend: Top clients card (data-testid='top-clients-card') shows clients with avatars - PASSED
Frontend: Peak days card (data-testid='peak-days-card') shows bar chart for Mon-Sun - PASSED
Frontend: Peak hours card (data-testid='peak-hours-card') shows horizontal bars - PASSED
Frontend: Cancellation breakdown (data-testid='cancel-breakdown-card') shows pie chart - PASSED
Frontend: Period filter 7 días (data-testid='period-week') works correctly - PASSED
Frontend: Period filter 30 días (data-testid='period-month') works correctly - PASSED
Frontend: Period filter 90 días (data-testid='period-quarter') works correctly - PASSED
Frontend: Period filter 1 año (data-testid='period-year') works correctly - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: Backend reports endpoint (server.py lines 1125-1295) correctly aggregates data from bookings, transactions, services, and users collections
Frontend ReportsTab.jsx uses proper data-testid attributes for all interactive and informational elements
Period filters correctly update API call parameter and refresh data
Recharts v3.6.0 used for BarChart, PieChart, LineChart components
Change indicators show comparison to previous period with TrendingUp/TrendingDown icons
Empty state handling ('Sin datos') works correctly when no data in selected period
Cancellation breakdown pie chart only shows when there are cancellations
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing business 'Test Real Stripe' with ~12 bookings in last 30 days.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports tab feature fully tested. Key points: (1) Tab uses data-testid='tab-reports' and is visible only for users with 'view_reports' permission. (2) All summary cards, charts, and data tables have proper data-testid attributes. (3) Period filters (week/month/quarter/year) work correctly and update all data. (4) Business 'Test Real Stripe' has 12 bookings in last 30 days, 2 services, 3 clients. (5) Revenue shows $0 since transactions are test data without actual payments.

summary_cards.revenue_card: Shows total revenue with change indicator
summary_cards.bookings_card: Shows total bookings with change indicator
summary_cards.cancel_card: Shows cancellations with cancel rate percentage

charts.revenue_chart: BarChart showing daily revenue and bookings
charts.peak_days_chart: BarChart showing bookings by day of week (Lun-Dom)
charts.cancel_breakdown: PieChart showing cancellations by user vs business

data_tables.top_services: Shows top 5 services with booking count and revenue
data_tables.top_clients: Shows top 5 clients with visits and total spent
data_tables.peak_hours: Shows top 6 peak hours with booking count
